problem id: 093de4ea
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11110010 -> 00111001
  10000110 -> 00000011
  10010100 -> 01001010
  01000000 -> 00100000
  10110100 -> 01011010
  11011010 -> 00101101
  00100001 -> 10010000
  01110101 -> 00011010

query: 11010100
predicted answer: 01101010
